alkylation reagent: with 20 mM of iodoacetamide for 45 min
alkylation concentration: with 20 mM of iodoacetamide for 45 min
cleavage agent: following the addition of Trypsin (Promega, Madison, WI, USA) for overnight digestion
collision energy: a collision energy of 35% at a resolution of 15k
enrichment method: using magnetic anti-FLAG epitope conjugated beads (Millipore Sigma, M8823)
fragmentation method: CID fragmentation in the ion trap (rapid mode)
instrument: Mass spectrometry experiments were performed on an Orbitrap Lumos Tribrid
ionization type: An electrospray voltage of 1.9 kV was applied to the eluent via the EASY-Spray column electrode.
reduction reagent: 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) to reduce the disulfide bonds
reduction concentration: 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) to reduce the disulfide bonds
